hero.title: fatih guzel
hero.subtitle: solutions architect and software engineer from turkey. i speak in systems and build in style.

paragraphs: i build stuff, break stuff, and somehow make it all work again—only better. figuring out the hard stuff and turning it into something clean, handy, and well-thought-out? that's my thing. whether it's crafting apis or tackling messy codebases, i enjoy transforming chaos into polished solutions.
over the years, i've learned that every problem has a simpler solution—you just have to dig deep enough (or break a few things first).
this website is my corner to share what i've built, learned, or found interesting. i also create content on youtube @fatihlovestosimplify.

workTeaser.headline: open to consulting, architecture work, and interesting collaborations.
workTeaser.description: got something in mind or just want to talk? i'd love to hear from you.
